---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: presdec
---

## Problem or motivation

What workflow pain or limitation does this address? Who would benefit?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you have in mind. Feel free to include mockups or examples.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, or anything else that might help evaluate the request.
